result.stderr:
DbBroker.Cli 1.0.3+fd86c773349bdcdf874f7ffaaf98b2e40cf138e9
Copyright (C) 2026 Diego De Medeiros (https://github.com/diegosiao/DBBroker)

  -n, --namespace            The namespace the classes generated should be put
                             in. Required.

  -p, --provider             (Default: SqlServer) The database provider name
                             <SqlServer|Oracle>. Default is 'SqlServer'.

  -c, --connectionString     The database provider connection string. Required.

  -f, --force                Overrides the dbbroker.config.json file if it
                             exists. Default is false.

  -d, --working-directory    Overrides the executable working directory.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
DbBroker.Cli 1.0.3+fd86c773349bdcdf874f7ffaaf98b2e40cf138e9
Copyright (C) 2026 Diego De Medeiros (https://github.com/diegosiao/DBBroker)

  -n, --namespace    The specific context namespace you want to update. You can
                     use the namespace or context name.

  -f, --file         Provide a file path to a configuration file you want to use
                     to synchronize. You can use multiple files at once.

  -d, --debug        (Default: false) Enables debug logging for the
                     synchronization process.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

staticCommands.name: init
staticCommands.description: Initializes and outputs a 'dbbroker.config.json' with the parameters specified.

options.description: The database provider connection string. Required.
Overrides the dbbroker.config.json file if it exists. Default is false.
The namespace the classes generated should be put in. Required.
The database provider name <SqlServer|Oracle>. Default is 'SqlServer'.

staticCommands.name: sync
staticCommands.description: Synchronizes your Entity Data Models with the respective database

options.description: Enables debug logging for the synchronization process.
Provide a file path to a configuration file you want to use to synchronize. You can use multiple files at once.
